title: Phostrogen Organic Tomato Food, 1L - Seaweed Enriched Organic Tomato Feed - with Balanced Nutrients for Better Flavour and Bigger, Juicier Yields - Plant Nutrition - Growing Vegetables, Red
features: TOMATO PLANT NUTRITION: For Bigger, Juicier And Full Flavoured Tomatoes
WITH SEAWEED: Enriched With Seaweed For Strong, Balanced Growth
TASTY TOMATOES: Improves Flavour And Yield Of Your Tasty Crops
EASY TO USE: Simply Mix With Water And Pour
ORGANIC: Certified For Organic Gardening By The Organic Farmers And Growers Association (OF&G)
description: From the manufacturer ORGANICALLY CERTIFIED Certified for organic gardening by Organic Farmers and Growers, Phostrogen Organic Liquid Tomato Food is ideal for producing bigger, juicier, and full flavoured tomatoes. EASY TO USE FEED A concentrated liquid, it is easy to use. Simply mix with water and pour at the base of your crop. 1L of product makes 83L of liquid plant food once diluted. PACKED WITH GOODNESS Packed with essential nutrients, it is also enriched with seaweed, increasing not only the number of tomatoes grown from the plant, but also aiding a stronger, healthier more resistant crop.
